programme.desc: Delphine, a disillusioned Latin teacher, made a deal with her class of 5 lazy students: if they keep quiet, they’ll all receive A grades without having to learn anything. Unfortunately, this qualifies them for a Latin competition taking place in Naples.

programme.title: Running To The Sky
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Jekshen is an exceptional runner living in a beautiful mountain village in Kyrgyzstan. Struggling to live with his divorced alcoholic father, Jeksen sees an upcoming big race as an opportunity to change his life for the better.

programme.title: The Return (2018)
programme.desc: Two Danish-Korean adoptees, Karoline and Thomas, return to their birth country for the first time. The pair meet in Seoul where they encounter fellow adoptees, sparking an emotional journey that challenges their destiny and identity.

programme.title: Black As The Snow 3: Off Limits
programme.desc: A senior executive of a multinational company is murdered on a ski lift in the French Alps. Captain Meyer decides to investigate after learning that his ex-lover is a suspect. Accompanied by French Officer Vivier, he is determined to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: The Rising Tide
programme.desc: When her father fails to return home, the sound of his boat’s engine is the only thing a daughter has to remember of him. Learning from an elderly mechanic, she wishes to repair her father’s boat in hope of his return.

programme.title: Cortina Express
programme.desc: During the Christmas holidays in Cortina, a colorful cast of characters cross paths among the snow-capped Ampezzo mountains. Between love, redemption, and second-chances, their lives collide in a series of hilarious and heartfelt quests for a happy ending

programme.title: The Takeover
programme.desc: Cédric works in a company specialized in precision mechanics. Its management, run by an investment fund, is disastrous. As another fund is about to buy it again, Cédric decides to take the company over, giving it to the employees.

programme.title: Murder Party
programme.desc: Jeanne, a brilliant architect, is appointed to restore the sumptuous Daguerre mansion owned by an eccentric family. When the patriarch is found dead during a murder party, Jeanne finds herself caught up in a real-life investigation to unmask the killer.

programme.title: Ricky
programme.desc: When Katie, an ordinary woman, meets Paco, an ordinary man, something magical and miraculous happens: a love story. From this union will be born an extraordinary baby: Ricky.

Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution. 轻巧省空间，开箱即用。安静运行、减震护膝，可调速度与坡度，适合快走与慢跑。折叠后薄至12公分，轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放，让居家运动更轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Knee TENS
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go. OMRON 膝盖电疗仪是一款非药物、非侵入式的膝部护理设备，采用微电流技术TENS，有效缓解膝盖疼痛与僵硬感。产品轻巧易用，通过温和电脉冲刺激神经、促进血液循环，帮助缓解因关节炎、运动伤害或过度使用引起的不适。多段强度可调，贴合膝盖设计，提供精准、舒适的护理体验。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - PHS HAIRSCIENCE HOM/FEM Anti-Hair Loss Bundle
programme.desc: FEM & HOM Fortify Hair Loss Bundle restore scalp health and reduce hair fall for both men and women with thinning hair concerns. FEM & HOM 防脱发套组，恢复头皮健康，减少男女头发稀疏问题。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Biowell Vital Fish Oil
programme.desc: Biowell Vital Fish Oil, contains 97% Omega-3 and adds red yeast, helping maintain the health level of the three highs. It is suitable for people who care about heart and brain health. Biowell concentrated Fish Oil, 95% concentrated fish oil. High in DHA and added with lutein. It helps improve memory, protect eyesight, and relieve dry and tired eyes. Biowell Vital Fish Oil 针对三高族群设计，含有高达97%纯度的Omega-3，并特别添加红曲，有助于维护心、血管健康、维护胆固醇、有助于稳定血压和血糖。Biowell concentrated Fish Oil, 95%高纯度浓缩鱼油；富含DHA并添加叶黄素，有助提升专注力、保护视力、缓解眼睛干涩疲劳，脑眼双补！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos Shuttle Chef Thermal Cooker
programme.desc: Energy-saving, no-fire thermal cooker preserves nutrients, prepare in the morning, enjoy a hot meal later 节能无火焖烧锅，保持食物营养, 早上轻松准备，晚上即可享用热食

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - TIGER EDGE SLB-A10U Food Blender
programme.desc: A premium innovation—patented 45° angled blades crush fruits, frozen foods, and ice while keeping flavor. The angled vortex ensures smooth blends, with 10 speeds for any texture. Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Pro 2-in-1 Humidifier and Purifier
programme.desc: When Hazelle walks into an empty office, she discovers a full-blown flu outbreak! Find out how Hazelle uses the 2-in-1 Humidifier and Purifier to fight back against stale air, germs, and dry office conditions. 当 Hazelle 走进空荡荡的办公室时，竟发现同事们全军覆没！ 快来看 Hazelle 如何用这台二合一加湿净化机，对抗干燥空气、细菌和闷热的办公室环境.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ErgoLuxe Ergonomic Chair v2
programme.desc: What starts as another chaotic workday turns into a full-blown chair investigation! From posture analysis to ergonomic upgrades, Zeliang's on a mission to save Hazelle (and her spine) from bad office habits. Discover how a few smart adjustments and one seriously comfy chair can make every hour at your desk feel a whole lot lighter! 今天的办公室，不只是打工日，而是一场"椅子侦查"！泽亮化身CSI专家，检查Hazelle从颈项到腰椎的"犯罪现场" 一场笑料背后，其实藏着打工人久坐的真实痛点。跟着他们一起学几招，让坐班族也能轻松舒适过每一天！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Elekiban 200MT Magnet Patch for Pain Relief
programme.desc: Elekiban 200MT Magnet Patch for Pain Relief. A trusted and beloved product in Japan for over 50 years. Non-Chemical, Drug-Free Relief – Helps to relieve muscle pain without the use of heat, cold, or medication. Magnetism helps stimulate healthy blood flow and relieve your stiff muscles. Provides Targeted, Long-Lasting Effect, each patch can be used up to 5 days. 已有 50 多年的历史,在日本备受信赖和喜爱。运用磁力物理原理，不含药物成分，无需使用热敷、冷敷或药物，即可帮助缓解肌肉疼痛。磁力有助于促进健康的血液循环，进而有助于缓解肌肉僵硬。提供精准持久的缓解疼痛效果，每贴可使用长达 5 天。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Philips Azur Steam Iron
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. The intelligent temperature control guarantees no scorching, allowing you to iron both horizontally and vertically with ease. Philips Azur 8000系列蒸汽熨斗有OptimalTEMP免调校温控技术，保证不会把面料烫坏。智能温控保证不熨焦，让您水平、垂直熨烫一机搞定！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - [24 Bottles] Kinohimitsu Bird's Nest Red Dates & Wolfberry + Bird's Nest Chinese Ginseng
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu Bird’s Nest is hand-picked and traditionally brewed to enhance beauty, boost vitality, and restore energy. The Ginseng Bird’s Nest relieves fatigue, while the Red Date & Goji Berry version promotes a radiant complexion Kinohimitsu燕窝采用纯手工挑毛与古法炖煮，营养丰富，助美容养颜、增强体质、恢复活力。长白山人参燕窝饮补气强身、缓解疲劳；红枣枸杞燕窝饮促进气血循环，令肌肤红润透亮.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos TCMF-501 0.5L Mug with Strainer & Handle
programme.desc: Sleek and lightweight Thermos Mug with strainer for you to enjoy your tea to the fullest. Suitable for everyday use! 一杯多用， 茶水分离, 设计典雅的茶漏咖啡杯让你方便携带！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Imperial Japanese Abalone & Buddha Jumps Over the Wall
programme.desc: Elevate your dishes this Lunar New Year with superior quality Japanese abalone and scallop, in braised sauce made with old hens stewed for 72 hours. Alternatively, enjoy the abalone in brine, which is a perfect addition to soups. The Buddha Jumps Over The Wall contains 5 premium ingredients including Sea Cucumber, Abalone, and Fish Maw. Simply warm the bowl in hot water, and it is ready to serve! 在这个农历新年，以优质日本鲍鱼与干贝为佳肴增添奢华风味，再搭配以老母鸡72 小时熬制而成的浓郁卤汁，滋味醇厚。另外还有盐水浸制的优质日本鲍鱼，是加入汤品的理想选择。 佛跳墙含有五种上乘食材：海参、鲍鱼、响螺片、花胶、干贝。只需将碗放入热水中加热，即可享用——方便快捷！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - IRIS OHYAMA Dust Mite Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Powerful, lightweight dust mite vacuum with a smart indicator light for easy monitoring and dust mites removal up to 98%. 强力轻便的尘螨吸尘器，配有智能指示灯，方便监控，尘螨去除率高达98%。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HQ Ling Zhi
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body’s immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism. HQ 灵芝破壁孢子粉由新加坡配制和生产。它能够增强身体的免疫系统，减少疲劳，促进血液循环，保护肝脏，并改善新陈代谢。

programme.title: WTT Singapore Smash 2026
programme.desc: WTT Singapore Smash is the world's premier table tennis event in Singapore happening from 19 Feb to 1 Mar 2026 at the Kallang. In this fifth edition, watch the biggest stars in the sport like Wang Chuqin, Tomokazu Harimoto and Felix Lebrun, light up the spectacular Infinity ∞ Arena with high-octane table tennis. The stakes are high with USD 1,500,000 in prize money and 2000 world ranking points up for grabs in this premier WTT Series event.

programme.title: Ini Baru Rare: Iceland - EP 15

Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.
